seo.homeDescription: CCkids provides safe, ergonomic, and colorful furniture solutions for preschools and kindergartens.
seo.aboutDescription: Discover CCkids' story, values, and preschool furniture production approach.
seo.contactDescription: Get in touch with CCkids. Reach our phone, email, showroom, and factory address details here.
seo.productsDescription: Explore tables, chairs, cabinets, and more for preschools and kindergartens in our product categories.
seo.projectsDescription: Review completed preschool and kindergarten projects by CCkids and get inspired.
seo.referencesDescription: Explore institutions that trust CCkids and our reference portfolio.

about.fallback: We produce colorful and ergonomic furniture where children can play and learn safely. Every product includes love, quality, and creativity.
about.storySubtitle: On this journey to produce durable and functional preschool furniture that children can use safely, we have always prioritized quality and trust.
about.valuesSubtitle: We carry these values in every furniture piece we produce.
about.ctaSubtitle: Let's design your dream preschool furniture together. Our expert team is with you at every step.

2010.title: Getting Started
2010.desc: We started operations in Ankara to produce child-friendly furniture tailored for preschool institutions. Durability, ergonomics, and child safety have always been our top priorities.

2014.title: Our Production Strength
2014.desc: In line with growing demand, we expanded our production capacity and product variety. Today we offer institution-specific production in different sizes and designs.

2022.title: Education-Focused Designs
2022.desc: By considering the needs of educators and institutions, we started developing designs suitable for classroom use that support child development.

today.desc: Today, from our production facility in Ankara, we serve many preschools and kindergartens across Turkey. As CCKids, we continue to provide great comfort for little hands.

safety.title: Safety
safety.desc: Child safety comes first. Rounded corners, non-toxic paints, and robust structure are our standards.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Nature-respectful production. All our products are made of wood and A+ quality materials.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.desc: Designs that nurture children's imagination. Every product is a game, every color an adventure.

love.title: Love
love.desc: Every product is designed with love and produced with care. We do our best for our children.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: We deliver the quality we promise. Lifelong service support.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Continuous improvement and innovation. We follow education trends and improve our products.
